lessons.title: Boiling Water
lessons.description: Learn how to boil water safely and effectively.
steps: Place the pot on the stove.
Turn on the heat to high.
Wait for the water to reach a rolling boil.
Turn off the heat and carefully remove the pot from the stove.
safety_notes: Always use oven mitts when handling hot pots.

lessons.title: Basic Knife Skills
lessons.description: Learn how to safely use a knife in the kitchen.
steps: Hold the knife properly with a firm grip.
Practice cutting soft vegetables like cucumbers or tomatoes.
Always cut away from your body and keep fingers tucked in.
safety_notes: Keep knives sharp to prevent accidents.
Always cut on a stable surface.
